zh.Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spai: 西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩莫拉貝納文特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Álvar Rodríguez Osorio de Villalobos I Señor de Villaornate於1230年出生在西班牙利安時，他的父親Conde Rodrigo Rodriguez de Osorio Y Villalobos30歲，母親Mayor Alvarez De Asturias24歲。他和Elvira Nuñez de Astorga至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1253年在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩莫拉貝納文特享年23歲。

zh-hans.Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spai: 西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩莫拉貝納文特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Álvar Rodríguez Osorio de Villalobos I Señor de Villaornate于1230年出生在西班牙利安时，他的父亲Conde Rodrigo Rodriguez de Osorio Y Villalobos30岁，母亲Mayor Alvarez De Asturias24岁。他和Elvira Nuñez de Astorga至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1253年在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩莫拉貝納文特享年23岁。

nameMeanings.name: Señor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Andres, Blanca, Don Juan, Felipe, Valeria.
Spanish (Señor): nickname from the title señor‘mister’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Álvar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a medieval name this was from the Old English personal name Ælfhere, composed of ælf ‘elf, supernatural being’ + here ‘army, warrior’. In modern use it may be a revival of this, a transferred use of the surname derived from it, or an Anglicized form of Spanish Álvaro, a Visigothic personal name derived from Germanic al ‘all’ + war ‘guard’.

nameMeanings.name: Rodríguez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Luis, Carlos, Jesus, Francisco, Jorge, Pedro, Raul, Miguel, Roberto, Ramon, Rafael.  Portuguese Wenceslao, Ligia, Catarina, Paulo, Joaquim, Omero, Joao, Wenseslao, Adauto, Albeiro, Godofredo.

Spanish (Rodríguez) and Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name Rodrigo . Rodriguez (including in the sense 2 below) is the ninth most frequent surname in the US. Compare De Rodriguez and Rodriquez .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Rodiguez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Luis, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Pedro, Raul, Adriana, Alvaro, Ana Luz, Angel, Armando, Arnulfo.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodriquez
meanings: Spanish (Rodríquez): variant of Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ). This surname is very rare in Spain.

variants.name: Rodriges
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodreguez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodrigo
meanings: Visigothic: composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame’ + rīc ‘power’. It was the name of the last king of the Visigoths, defeated by the Moors in 711 .

nameMeanings.name: Osorio
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Luis, Francisco, Jorge, Miguel, Mario, Jaime, Manuel, Rafael, Ana.  Portuguese Agostinho, Marcio.

Spanish; Portuguese (Osório): from a medieval personal name Osorius, of uncertain origin. It is perhaps a metathesized form of Latin Orosius (Greek Orosios, a derivative of oros ‘mountain’), the name borne by a 4th-century Iberian theologian and historian, who was famous in Spain throughout the Middle Ages. Compare Ozorio .

variants.name: Osornio
meanings: Hispanic (Mexico): probably an altered form of Spanish   Osorio  , influenced by   Osorno  .

variants.name: Osoria
meanings: Spanish: from the personal name Osoria, feminine form of Osorio . This surname is most common in the Dominican Republic, Mexico, and Cuba. Compare Ozoria .

variants.name: Ozorio
meanings: Spanish; Portuguese (Ozório): variant of Osorio .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘Bright’.

nameMeanings.name: Villalobos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Luis, Carlos, Francisco, Manuel, Ruben, Javier, Rafael, Mario, Ramon.
Spanish: habitational name from Villalobos in Zamora province, named from villa ‘(outlying) farmstead, (dependent) settlement’ (see Villa ) + lobos, plural of lobo ‘wolf’.

variants.name: Villalovos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Maurillo, Adolfo, Alfonso, Apolonia, Arcadio, Armando, Bernardo, Celso, Dionicio, Domingo, Ezequiel.
Spanish: variant of   Villalobos  .

variants.name: Villa
meanings: Shortened form of   Camilla  , also sometimes used as an independent given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Álvar Rodríguez Osorio de Villalobos I Señor de Villaornate was born in 1230, in León, Spain, his father, Conde Rodrigo Rodriguez de Osorio Y Villalobos, was 30 and his mother, Mayor Alvarez De Asturias, was 24. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Elvira Nuñez de Astorga. He died in 1253, in Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 23.

fr.Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spai: Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Espagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Álvar Rodríguez Osorio de Villalobos I Señor de Villaornate est né en 1230, à León, Espagne, son père, Conde Rodrigo Rodriguez de Osorio Y Villalobos, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mayor Alvarez De Asturias, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Elvira Nuñez de Astorga. Il est décédé en 1253, à Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 23 ans.

de.Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spai: Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Álvar Rodríguez Osorio de Villalobos I Señor de Villaornate 1230 in León, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Conde Rodrigo Rodriguez de Osorio Y Villalobos 30 und seine Mutter Mayor Alvarez De Asturias 24. Er hatte mit Elvira Nuñez de Astorga mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1253 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spanien.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Elvira Nuñez de Astorga. Morì nel 1253, nel Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 23 anni.

ko.Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spai: 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 자모라 베나븐트
ko.lifeSummary: Álvar Rodríguez Osorio de Villalobos I Señor de Villaornate(이)가 1230년 스페인 레o에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conde Rodrigo Rodriguez de Osorio Y Villalobos(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mayor Alvarez De Asturias(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Elvira Nuñez de Astorga(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 자모라 베나븐트에서 23세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Elvira Nuñez de Astorga. Ele faleceu em 1253, em Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 23 anos.

ru.Benavente, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spai: бенавент, замора, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Álvar Rodríguez Osorio de Villalobos I Señor de Villaornate родился в 1230 г. в местности леoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Conde Rodrigo Rodriguez de Osorio Y Villalobos было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mayor Alvarez De Asturias, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Elvira Nuñez de Astorga. Он умер в 1253 г. в местности бенавент, замора, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 23 лет.
